notes: roundEvents are reminders for squads that arrive during a numbered round.
remindAfterRound is the completed round after which the tracker should warn players about the next round.
specialArrivals are conditional arrivals from the mission table and need mission-specific rules text before they can become automatic reminders.
Each squad has name, vector, ai, ship, elite, and raw fields.
The ship field stores objects with the extracted PDF icon code, mapped ship names, and xwing-miniatures-font CSS classes when known.
The elite field is inferred from the extracted elite marker and should be reviewed.
Setup squads are intentionally omitted from this file; they belong in mission setup data.
